# 냉장고 재료 LLM entrypoint

Project: 냉장고 재료, also presented in the UI as 자취생의 모든것.
Purpose: help people living alone turn ingredients they already have into meal
recommendations, missing-ingredient lists, priority-use hints, and visible food
cost savings.

Read these first:

1. docs/llm-wiki/index.md
2. docs/llm-wiki/overview.md
3. docs/llm-wiki/features.md
4. docs/llm-wiki/api.md
5. docs/llm-wiki/deployment.md
6. docs/llm-wiki/data-model.md
7. docs/llm-wiki/llm-usage.md

Repository anchors:

- README.md: human-facing project overview and local run notes.
- server.js: Node HTTP server, API routing, AI fallback, auth, and static file serving.
- public/: browser UI for recommendations, auth, notes, shopping, places, tips, and chatbot.
- lib/local-db.js: local JSON database adapter.
- lib/supabase-db.js: Supabase REST database adapter.
- supabase/schema.sql: Supabase table schema.
- docs/deployment.md: deployment notes.
- docs/limited-feature-recovery-plan.md: GitHub Pages limitations and backend recovery plan.

Security rules:

- Never put .env values in public files, docs examples, screenshots, or frontend code.
- Never expose GROQ_API_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, ADMIN_PASSWORD, or data/app.db.json.
- Browser code must not call Groq or Supabase service-role APIs directly.
- Server-side routes own auth, secret-backed AI calls, database writes, and admin controls.

Current operating model:

- The app runs locally with node server.js and no package installation.
- If GROQ_API_KEY and GROQ_MODEL are missing, recommendations use deterministic fallback data.
- Local persistence uses data/app.db.json, which is ignored by Git.
- Supabase can replace local persistence when SUPABASE_DB_ENABLED=true and server-side secrets are configured.
- GitHub Pages can host public static files only; login, pantry DB, AI, history, chatbot API, and admin features require the Node backend.

Answering guidance for LLMs:

- Prefer the LLM wiki for project intent, terminology, and architectural summaries.
- Prefer source files for exact behavior, route handlers, validation, and data shapes.
- Mention uncertainty when docs and code disagree, then treat code as the source of truth.
- Keep answers scoped to 냉장고 재료 unless the user explicitly asks to include unrelated OneDrive documents.
